Use getDownloadUrl for private blob chunk downloads

Bearer token fetch may corrupt binary data. Use official
getDownloadUrl() to generate signed URLs for reliable downloads.

was looking for response.data.zones and response.data.profiles which
don't exist. Now correctly handles both array and object response formats.

commit.message:
feat: 完善进化系统审批流程和报告

重大改进：

1. ✅ 修正在线架构图地址
   - 从 https://z58362026.github.io/amazing/docs/index.html
   - 改为 https://z58362026.github.io/amazing/
   - 批量更新所有文档中的链接

2. ✅ 强制架构师审批
   - 所有进化都需要架构师审批
   - 不再有自动批准
   - 确保变更可控

3. ✅ 生成详细进化报告
   - 基本信息（ID/Agent/类型/时间/状态）
   - 进化描述
   - 变更详情（JSON 格式）
   - 影响分析（下游 Agent/关联工作流/风险级别）
   - 审批建议（优势/风险/建议）
   - 审批流程（批准/拒绝命令）

4. ✅ 完善审批流程
   - approve: 批准进化（需要审批意见）
   - reject: 拒绝进化（需要拒绝理由）
   - 记录审批人和审批意见
   - 记录拒绝理由

5. ✅ 架构完整性分析
   - 创建 ARCHITECTURE_ANALYSIS.md
   - 详细分析当前架构完整性
   - 识别需要改进的地方
   - 总体评分：93/100 → 98/100

使用示例：
# 提议进化（自动生成报告）
python scripts/evolve.py propose --agent=page-generator --type=prompt_refinement --description="优化页面生成逻辑"

# 架构师审查报告
cat docs/evolution/reports/evo-xxx.md

# 批准进化
python scripts/evolve.py approve evo-xxx --approver="张三（架构师）" --comment="变更合理，批准"

# 拒绝进化
python scripts/evolve.py reject evo-xxx --approver="张三（架构师）" --reason="风险过高，暂不批准"

# 应用进化
python scripts/evolve.py apply evo-xxx

测试结果：
- ✅ 进化报告生成成功
- ✅ 审批流程正常工作
- ✅ 审批意见正确记录
- ✅ 在线架构图地址已修正

架构完整性提升：
- 从 93/100 → 98/100
- 进化系统审批流程完善
- 文档链接全部修正

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- LiveActivityFeed: auto-cycling ticker with universities + hourly counter

Research-backed decisions: 5-second value rule, specific risk reversal,
semi-anonymous social proof, thumb-zone CTA placement, fear elimination
through implicit framing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore client PUT to always-overwrite — put_if_newer only for replication (v0.6.1)

Client DHT PUT (handle_t2_put) was incorrectly changed to use put_if_newer
in the replication redesign commit. This caused subsequent PUTs to the same
key with seq=0 to be skipped by the hash tiebreaker, resulting in lost
messages when the outbox blob was updated.

put_if_newer is only correct for inter-node replication paths (STORE_VALUE,
hinted handoff, FIND_VALUE cache). Client PUT must always overwrite since
the signature is verified = authorized owner.

commit.message:
平翘舌检测：对比 syll.symbol 与 chars 标准拼音

数据层：
- 5个句子各自添加 chars 数组（{c:汉字, p:拼音数字式}）
  覆盖所有平翘舌字：识(shi4) 是(shi4) 中(zhong1) 成(cheng2) 首(shou3)
  事(shi4) 说(shuo1) 等

逻辑层：
- getInitial(py): 从拼音提取声母，优先匹配 zh/ch/sh
- applyRetroflexCheck(): 对比讯飞 syllSymbol 与标准 chars 声母
  检测 zh↔z / ch↔c / sh↔s 混淆，写入 perrLevel+perrMsg
- parseIseResult 保存每个 word 的 firstSyll.symbol → syllSymbol
- evaluateAudio 在 parseIseResult 后调用 applyRetroflexCheck
  并重新用更新后的 perrLevel 计算总分

commit.message:
fix(mic): relax detection for real instrument — lower confidence, longer sustain, better logging

User reports: wrong notes, not detecting, notes too short. Root cause: previous
tuning was too strict for phone mic + room acoustics. Three key changes:

1. minConfidence 0.55→0.35: Phone mic reverb drops YIN confidence to 0.3-0.6
   for valid notes. NoteTracker's 2-confirmation requirement already filters
   single-frame noise, so we can afford lower confidence threshold.

2. releaseHoldMs 100→250ms: Piano notes sustain 1-5s but amplitude decays
   below RMS threshold within a few hundred ms. Longer release hold prevents
   premature note-off during sustain.

3. rmsThreshold 0.012→0.006: Decaying piano sustain was being gated as silence.
   Lower threshold catches the full sustain envelope.

Also: increased NoteTracker gap tolerance 1→2 frames (handles mic buffer drops
during onset), disabled auto-calibration (was raising RMS threshold too high),
added verbose per-buffer logging for first 30 detections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 添加命令行账号管理工具，支持多机器人配置

## 新增功能
- 创建 account-cli.js 命令行工具
- 支持添加、删除、切换、列出多个机器人账号
- 交互式输入，支持密码隐藏
- 账号验证功能

## 命令列表
- node scripts/account-cli.js add      # 添加机器人
- node scripts/account-cli.js list     # 查看所有机器人
- node scripts/account-cli.js current  # 显示当前机器人
- node scripts/account-cli.js switch   # 切换机器人
- node scripts/account-cli.js delete   # 删除机器人
- node scripts/account-cli.js validate # 验证机器人权限

## 文档更新
- 更新 MULTI-ACCOUNT.md 说明CLI使用方式
- 更新 SKILL.md 添加单/多机器人配置说明
- 移除UI配置相关说明

## 解决的问题
- 环境变量只能配置一个机器人的限制
- 删除UI后无法管理多账号的问题
- 提供更灵活的配置方式

commit.message:
Taux de retrait : rendement - inflation au lieu du 4% hardcodé

Le 4% de la Trinity Study n'est valable que pour rendement ~6% et
inflation ~2%. Avec d'autres paramètres, ça épuise le capital en réel.
Le SWR (sustainable withdrawal rate) est maintenant rendement - inflation,
ce qui préserve le pouvoir d'achat du capital quelle que soit la config.

commit.message:
feat(sdk): add Python + TypeScript SDK for Chameleon agent framework

Python SDK (pip install chameleon-agent):
- AgentLoop, SubAgentTool, Registry, ToolDispatcher, OpenAIProvider
- 27 tests (registry, agent loop, sub-agent, parallel dispatch, runtime registration)

TypeScript SDK (npm install chameleon-agent):
- Re-exports from @cli-agent/core, @cli-agent/agent, @cli-agent/providers
- Single public entry point for external consumers

Both SDKs share identical architecture patterns:
- Registry<ITool> for pluggable components
- SubAgentTool as ITool (no separate sub-agent API)
- Runtime dynamic register/unregister
- Parallel tool dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: move scene group suffix stripping to end-of-string only

The noise pattern `-[A-Za-z0-9]{2,15}` was matching mid-title hyphens
in movies like "Non-Stop", "Spider-Man", "Ant-Man", "X-Men". Moved the
pattern out of NOISE_PATTERNS and into clean_title() where it runs after
whitespace cleanup, matching only at end-of-string.

commit.message:
Fix critical pagination and rendering bugs

CRITICAL FIXES:
1. Height mismatch: Rendering now uses contentHeightPage2Plus (720px)
   instead of (pageHeight - 60) = 760px - they must match pagination
2. Width mismatch: All pages now use paginationWidth (500px) for
   consistent content flow between pages
3. Height accumulation bug: Changed currentHeight = part.height to
   currentHeight += part.height in splitLargeElement - was corrupting
   height tracking after splitting elements

ROOT CAUSE: Pagination calculated content for 720px height but rendering
created 760px containers, causing 40px mismatch per page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: show all registry packages in Browse tab without requiring search

Previously the Browse tab required typing at least 2 characters before
any packages appeared, making it impossible to discover available packages
without already knowing their names.

- Backend: allow empty q in GET /api/packages/search; lists all packages
  from all registries when no query is provided
- Hook: remove enabled guard so usePackageSearch fires on tab open
- Browse tab: remove 2-char minimum, show all packages by default with
  "N packages available" counter; typing filters results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add AST validation that cross-checks nodes against source text

validate_file_ast() runs 5 checks after AST generation:
1. Node type keyword present in source_text (MOVE node contains "MOVE")
2. line_start <= line_end
3. PERFORM/CALL target attribute matches source_text
4. Source line at line_start contains expected keyword
5. Leaf node line ordering within paragraph

Runs automatically during build_ast_from_parsed() and logs warnings
for any issues found. Zero issues on 39-file CardDemo test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(085): deliverables handoff guide

Add _write_handoff helper to cli.py and call it after step 10 of
cmd_run. Writes outputs/<run_id>/deliverables_handoff.md when at least
one visual artifact (slides/infographic) was successfully downloaded.

- Trigger: visual keyword in deliverables AND at least one downloaded
- Skipped: all downloads failed, briefing-only, --dry-run, --review
- Sections: intro, generated deliverables, Canva steps, Google Slides
  steps (subsections by downloaded artifact), checklist, provenance
- Plain text URLs only (no Markdown hyperlinks)
- Google Slides section present for slides OR infographic keyword
- handoff_path added to run_manifest.json (null when not written)
- Write failure is non-fatal (warning logged, run continues)
- 14 tests, 101 total passing

Spec: spec/2026-03-07_085_handoff_canva_slides.md v1
